title: poa forsteri
intro: Poa forsteri, also known as Forster's blue grass or blue grass, is a species of grass that is native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Poa forsteri include infusions and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
